violations.description: Ensure attributes that begin with aria- are valid ARIA attributes
violations.help: ARIA attributes must conform to valid names

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Invalid ARIA attribute name: aria-title

violations.description: Ensure the order of headings is semantically correct
violations.help: Heading levels should only increase by one

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Heading order invalid

violations.description: Ensure image alternative is not repeated as text
violations.help: Alternative text of images should not be repeated as text

nodes.failureSummary: Fix all of the following: Element contains element with alt text that duplicates existing text

violations.description: Ensure every form element has a label

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element does not have an implicit (wrapped) <label>
  Element does not have an explicit <label>
  aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty
  aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty
  Element has no title attribute
  Element has no placeholder attribute
  Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" or role="presentation"
